message: Add GitHub Actions CI with shellcheck

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [ main ]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [ main ]
+
+jobs:
+  lint:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Shellcheck
+        run: shellcheck install.sh
+
